## Icon Contribution

### Device Info

- **Device name**:
- **Category**: <!-- Compute / Storage / Network / Wireless / Workstations -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Both `dark.svg` and `light.svg` variants included
- [ ] Icons placed in `public/img/<icon-name>/` directory
- [ ] Followed the [color scheme](../CLAUDE.md#node-icon-color-scheme) for the device category:
  - Compute: Blue (`#38bdf8`)
  - Storage: Green (`#4ade80`)
  - Network: Red (`#e74c3c`)
  - Wireless: Purple (`#9b59b6`)
  - Workstations: Neutral gray
- [ ] Used appropriate LED colors (Activity: `#27ae60`, Power: `#38bdf8`)
- [ ] SVG is clean and optimized (no unnecessary metadata)
